verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I take my cross and follow You, Forsake my life in this world Through the cross, the world is dead to me And I am dead to the world

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Bind me to the horns of Your altar, oh Lord, And I’ll be a living sacrifice I lay down everything that hinders And cry out for a brand new heart.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I put my hand to the plow I never will look back Remove the stones from this well And let the living waters flow
